case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. YOLANDA M. CUA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 B (1)& (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUA, YOLANDA M. $1,306.57 PRINCIPAL, $467.50 INTEREST, $305.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,079.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACE IN PICK UP BOX)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (D). FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CUA, YOLANDA M. DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CUA, YOLANDA M.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $305.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CUA, YOLANDA M.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
